title: Tick Control in Hunts Point, Bronx | $125–$325 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Hunts Point, Bronx starting at $125. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Hunts Point residents face unique tick challenges due to the area's proximity to the Bronx River waterfront and industrial zones with overgrown vegetation. Our professional tick control services protect your family and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses common in this South Bronx neighborhood. We provide comprehensive tick treatments for residential properties, community gardens, and commercial spaces throughout Hunts Point.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Hunts Point for years with specialized knowledge of local tick populations near the produce market district and waterfront areas. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments safe for families and pets, with flexible scheduling to accommodate the busy Hunts Point community.
localContext: Hunts Point's unique position along the East River and Bronx River, combined with proximity to Barretto Point Park and the Hunts Point Riverside Park, creates ideal tick habitats in tall grasses and wooded areas. The neighborhood's mix of residential buildings, warehouses, and green spaces requires customized tick control solutions that address both urban and semi-natural environments.

faqs.question: Why is tick control important in Hunts Point?
faqs.answer: Hunts Point's waterfront parks, community gardens, and proximity to the Bronx River create prime tick habitats. Ticks in our area can carry Lyme disease, Rocky Mountain spotted fever, and other serious illnesses. Professional tick control protects your family, pets, and visitors from these health risks, especially during peak tick season from April through October.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Hunts Point?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Hunts Point range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, infestation severity, and treatment frequency. We offer single treatments for immediate relief and seasonal packages for year-round protection. We provide free inspections and customized quotes for all Hunts Point properties.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide tick control service in Hunts Point?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day tick control service throughout Hunts Point and the surrounding Bronx neighborhoods. Our technicians are familiar with the area and can quickly respond to urgent tick problems, especially during peak season when ticks are most active near waterfront areas and green spaces.

faqs.question: Are your tick control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved tick control products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. Treatments typically require a 2-4 hour drying period before the treated area is safe for full use. We provide clear instructions and work around your schedule to ensure maximum safety for your Hunts Point household.
